title: Cornucopia Brands Black 16-Ounce Glass Apothecary Bottles (3-Pack); Boston Round Bottles w/Designer Labels Ideal for Aromatherapy and DIY
description:
About this item
VALUE PACK: Get 3 matte black 16 oz glass bottles with lined phenolic caps and custom designer labels for aromatherapy and DIY use
BLACK COATING: The bottles are powder coated matte black for 100% UV protection and easy writing with chalk markers
MULTI-PURPOSE: Use for aromatherapy, tinctures, herbals, home decor, and even storing homemade brews or kombucha
LARGE SIZE: Each bottle is 6.75 inches tall and 2.9 inches in diameter with a 16 oz capacity of 475 ml
SAFE AND EASY: The lead-free glass bottles are microwave safe and hand wash only. Use a non-abrasive cloth and avoid dishwasher use
reviews_5s:
I needed to update my mantle decorations for Halloween this year. I already had a few things, but wanted to go for the classic Halloween horror look. These bottles were perfect for my mostly black mantle decorations. They are real glass and you have to put the stickers on, but they look great. Would definitely recommend.I absolutely love these decorations! You have to apply the stickers yourself but they are nice and thick and won’t tare. So if you don’t like the placement of them on the bottles you can peel them off and start over. I’m a little OCD so I actually really like that I was able to put them on myself. 10/10 would recommend!I have had these on my wish list for awhile, at 50% off I could no longer pass them up. They came on time and were packaged well. They came with 3 plastic lids as well as 3 corks and the stickers which were simple to apply. Will they stay stuck? Time will tell and I will reglue if they peel.
Love these bottles, they fit my Harry Potter theme very well!This was exactly what i wanted I use them for my kitchen oils. The bottles are painted well and the stickers adhesive works well so for. Will update over time on the durability of the label. As of right now, they are beautiful, perfect and just what I was looking for.The bottles are the perfect size. The labels were easy to apply. I added some black creepy branches and roses from the local craft store and placed them around the house.Love the bottles perfect black finish. The labels were a little hard to peel apart. People with arthritis or nails will have a little trouble. But well worth it. Would highly recommendThese are great bottles to display as apothecary or to use as soap dispensers. Unlike another reviewer, my Meyers soap dispenser did not fit (large or regular size) but I had 3 black dispensers from a Newton Home collection from Costco and those fit perfectly! A little pricey for something you can DIY but the mini corks and quality labels were worth it to me! Will definitely refuse year after year. I'm using 2 bottles as soap dispensers and one with the cork displayed on my mantle.Perfect size for my homemade Irish Cream and the bottles are so cute!I am using this for Halloween decor. I did not fill it with any liquid but you could if you wanted to do so. I set my decor up and placed these with old books and pumpkins. The labels are easy to apply. I placed the corks in the bottle for a more authentic look. They look great.I bought these as accents in my art room to add to the ambience of my inspiration. I have to say I love these. I had no issues with the stickers no peeling or anything. I did use the corks that came with them for a more authentic look. Overall very pleased with these bottles.
reviews_1s:
The bottles are OK. They're not black glass, rather they're clear glass with a black film applied. I could live with that if the labels had come with the bottles. They weren't in there. Extremely disappointed.As soon as I picked up the box I knew something was broken...I opened it up and of course...one out of the 3 was in pieces.. they are very Dainty bottles...super thin glass...if you were to drop one...it would shatter...

I'm not going to bother returning because let's face it...gas over $3 a gallon and the almost 30min drive one way isn't worth it...I'm going to spray paint a wine bottle black and use the 3rd sticker on it...Just received these in the mail. The bottles are great, however the vintage labels were NOT included. That was the main reason why I ordered these in the first place. Very disappointed.Do not purchase unless you enjoy trying to stop the labels from peeling off the bottles daily. So disappointing because they looked cute for the first 5 minutes. Only selected 1 star or I couldn’t post review.Received only two bottles intact-the other was shattered. Don’t waste your time.IT DOESNT COMES WITH LABELS AND STOPPERS LIDS!1 out of 3 bottles arrived shattered.Did not come with the labels.The bottles did not come with labels. Very disappointing.Ordered 2 and only have 3 stickers for 6 bottles
